description: The Legal department has issued a new Acceptable Use Policy for mobile devices. Configure the 'Laptops' and 'Tablets' asset categories in Snipe-IT to require user acceptance (digital signatures) using the text from '~/Documents/Legal/2026_Mobile_AUP.txt' in the Category EULA fields. Do not modify the 'Desktops' category. Check out the laptop 'LT-2026-001' and the tablet 'TAB-2026-001' to David Thorne (Username: dthorne) ensuring the assignments generate the required digital acceptance records.
